Package org.eventb.internal.ui.eventbeditor

Class EventBFormPage

java.lang.Object
org.eclipse.core.commands.common.EventManager
org.eclipse.ui.part.WorkbenchPart
org.eclipse.ui.part.EditorPart
org.eclipse.ui.forms.editor.FormPage
org.eventb.ui.eventbeditor.EventBEditorPage
org.eventb.internal.ui.eventbeditor.EventBFormPage
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.eclipse.core.runtime.IAdaptable, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IExecutableExtension, org.eclipse.jface.viewers.ISelectionProvider, org.eclipse.ui.forms.editor.IFormPage, org.eclipse.ui.IEditorPart, org.eclipse.ui.ISaveablePart, org.eclipse.ui.IWorkbenchPart, org.eclipse.ui.IWorkbenchPart2, org.eclipse.ui.IWorkbenchPart3, org.eclipse.ui.part.IWorkbenchPartOrientation
Direct Known Subclasses:
AxiomPage, CarrierSetPage, ConstantPage, EventPage, InvariantPage, SyntheticViewPage, VariablePage
public abstract class EventBFormPage extends EventBEditorPage implements org.eclipse.jface.viewers.ISelectionProvider

      pageTitle - The title of the page

  • Method Details

    • createFormContent

      protected void createFormContent(org.eclipse.ui.forms.IManagedForm managedForm)
      Overrides:
      createFormContent in class EventBEditorPage

    • createMasterSection

      protected abstract EventBPartWithButtons createMasterSection(org.eclipse.ui.forms.IManagedForm managedForm, org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Composite parent, int style, IEventBEditor<?> editor)
      This method create a master section which should be an Event-B Part with Buttons. Sub-class should implement this method and return their own specific part.

      Parameters:
      managedForm - The managed form used to create the part.
      parent - The composite parent of the part
      style - The style to create the part
      editor - The Event-B Editor.
      Returns:
      A new Event-B Part with Buttons

    • edit

      public void edit(IRodinElement element)
      Setting the selection within the page.

      Parameters:
      element - A Rodin Element

    • getPart

      public EventBPartWithButtons getPart()
      Return the Master part
      Returns:
      the Event-B Part with buttons which is the master part of the page.
